channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Centre rules out immediate support for state oil firms amid rising global crude prices
item.description: The Indian government has confirmed that there is no immediate plan to provide a bailout to state-run oil companies despite significant losses caused by the ongoing crisis in West Asia. The Union petr...

item.title: Gor Mahia Remain Focused as FKF Premier League Title Nears
item.description: Gor Mahia are seven points clear at the top of the FKF Premier League with only three matches remaining, yet coach Charles Akonnor is keeping the team grounded. Despite their historic dominance and a ...

item.title: DICT Chief Clarifies: No Resignation Submitted
item.description: The chief of the Department of Information and Communications Technology (DICT) has publicly denied reports claiming that he has tendered his resignation. In a statement released earlier today, he emp...

item.title: Labour Ministers Urge Starmer to Set Resignation Timetable Amid Electoral Losses
item.description: The Labour Party is facing growing internal pressure following disappointing local election results across England, Wales, and Scotland. Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer remains determined to stay in o...

item.title: Madina Okot Delivers Strong WNBA Debut Performance for Atlanta Dream
item.description: Kenya's Madina Okot made a solid entry into the Women's National Basketball Association (WNBA) with the Atlanta Dream. In her first official game, the towering 6-foot-6 centre showed why she was picke...

item.title: Commission Examines Police Interception of Nearly a Tonne of Cocaine in Gauteng
item.description: The Madlanga commission has been briefed on the interception of a substantial cocaine shipment in Gauteng. Colonel Francois Steyn, commander of the Gauteng West Rand Hawks, testified that police seize...

item.title: JAMB Sets Deadlines for University, Polytechnic, and College Admissions
item.description: The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) don give official deadline for all public universities wey dey Nigeria to finish their admissions for the 2025/2026 academic session before October ...

item.title: Wordle is Being Adapted into a TV Game Show Hosted by Savannah Guthrie
item.description: The popular word puzzle game Wordle is making its way to television as a game show. Savannah Guthrie, a well-known journalist and television personality, will serve as the show's host, while Jimmy Fal...

item.title: Centre to replace MGNREGA with VB-G Ram G Act from July 1 amid criticism from states and experts
item.description: The Union government has announced that the Viksit Bharat-Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission Gramin (VB-G Ram G) Act will come into force from July 1, replacing the long-standing Mahatma Gandhi...

item.title: Husband Sues Cincinnati Surgery Centre Following Wife's Death After Cosmetic Surgery
item.description: Rachel Tussey, a TikTok influencer and mother of three with over 80,000 followers, tragically died following a 'mommy makeover' procedure at the JourneyLite surgery centre in Cincinnati on 25 February...

item.title: Brampton couple charged in connection with $86,000 bank fraud
item.description: Authorities in Brampton, Ontario, have charged a married couple in relation to a series of bank frauds totaling $86,000. The duo allegedly engaged in identity-related crimes, targeting financial insti...

item.title: Inquiry Launched After PML-N MPA Injured and Four Staff Killed in Toba Tek Singh Attack
item.description: On Sunday night in Chak 184-GB, Toba Tek Singh, PML-N MPA Col (retired) Sardar Ayub Gadhi came under a brutal attack while sitting with his friends in his Dera. Unidentified gunmen opened fire indiscr...

item.title: Republican Redistricting Could Energize Democrats Ahead of 2026 Midterms
item.description: Conservative columnist S.E. Cupp has highlighted concerns that recent Republican efforts to redraw electoral maps ahead of the 2026 midterms may unintentionally harm their own party. During a CNN segm...

item.title: Tanzanian Diplomat Concludes Tenure in Seoul with Lasting Impact
item.description: Tanzania Insight reports that a Tanzanian diplomat has officially concluded his service in Seoul after many years of dedicated diplomatic work. Over his tenure, he has strengthened bilateral relations...

item.title: Andrea Koesters Explores Life and Ecology in the Arizona Desert Through Photography
item.description: Andrea Koesters, originally from Kentucky, relocated to the Sonoran Desert in southern Arizona in 2018, initially for an artist residency in the small town of Oracle. Captivated by the desert's ecolog...

item.title: Federal officials consider long-term Canadian ownership of Trans Mountain pipeline
item.description: The leaders of Trans Mountain Corporation and its federal overseer, the Canada Development Investment Corp. (CDEV), have indicated there is a strong rationale for the federal government to retain owne...

item.title: Bato dela Rosa claims divine intervention as he avoids arrest amid Senate dispute
item.description: Former Philippine Senator Bato dela Rosa reportedly told his supporters during a video call that he received 'divine help' in evading an arrest warrant linked to a planned Senate coup. According to ne...

item.title: Tim Wilson Unlikely to Become Treasurer After One Nation By-Election Shift
item.description: Following the recent One Nation by-election victory, it seems increasingly unlikely that Tim Wilson will ever assume the role of Treasurer of Australia. The Liberal Party’s ongoing struggles, highligh...

item.title: Kabras Sugar RFC secure sixth Kenya Cup title with narrow win over KCB
item.description: Kabras Sugar RFC have added another major trophy to their cabinet after beating KCB 14-8 in Kakamega to win their sixth Kenya Cup title. The result underlined Kabras’ consistency in Kenyan rugby and t...

item.title: Concerns over Muslim Representation after Creation of Five New Districts in Ladakh
item.description: Last month, the Union territory of Ladakh witnessed the formal addition of five new districts—Sham, Nubra, Changthang, Zanskar and Drass—bringing the total number of districts to seven. While the Cent...
